ElementDescription: The NDAR Global Unique Identifier (GUID) for research subject
Subject ID how it's defined in lab/project
Date on which the interview/genetic test/sampling/imaging/biospecimen was completed. MM/DD/YYYY
Age in months at the time of the interview/test/sampling/imaging.
Notes: Age is rounded to chronological month. If the research participant is 15-days-old at time of interview, the appropriate value would be 0 months. If the participant is 16-days-old, the value would be 1 month.
M = Male; F = Female; O=Other; NR = Not reported

ElementDescription: Subject group as defined in the study
Notes: bn= Bulimia Nervosa; hc= Healthy Control

ElementDescription: The time point at which the EMA is completed
Notes: 1= Right after the second scan (HC & BN); 2= At 6-month follow-up (BN only)

ElementDescription: Total number of episodes of objective binge eatings(OBEs) over 2 weeks of EMA
The total number of times the participant drank fluids to curb appetite over the 2-week period
The total number of compensatory exercise episodes over the 2-week period
The total number of self-induced vomiting episodes over the 2-week period
The total number of laxative misuse episodes over the 2-week period
The total number of diuretic misuse episodes over the 2-week period
The total number of non-prescribed medication use (as a way to control shape or weight) episodes over the 2-week period
The total number of chewing and spitting episodes over the 2-week period
The total number of meal skipping incidents over the 2-week period
The total number of snack skipping incidents over the 2-week period
The total number of times eating was avoided over the 2-week period
The total number of other compensatory behavior episodes over the 2-week period
